# PSStudio

> PSStudio is an open-source web application for managing Google Street View photospheres. It lets users upload, geo-tag, and publish equirectangular 360° photos directly to Google Maps via the Street View Publish API.

## What it does

- Upload equirectangular 360° images to Google Street View
- Place photospheres on an interactive map with exact GPS coordinates
- Set capture dates for accurate Street View timeline display
- View, edit location, and delete published photospheres
- Browse all published photos in a thumbnail gallery with an integrated 360° viewer

## Who it is for

Photographers, surveyors, businesses, and hobbyists who want to publish immersive Street View content to Google Maps without interacting with the API directly.

## Tech stack

- Framework: Next.js (App Router) with TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS with shadcn/ui components
- Maps: Leaflet / React Leaflet
- Authentication: Google OAuth 2.0
- API: Google Street View Publish API

## Pages

- https://photosphere.2xxn.dev/ — Landing page and login
- https://photosphere.2xxn.dev/studio — Main application (requires Google login)
- https://photosphere.2xxn.dev/privacy — Privacy Policy
- https://photosphere.2xxn.dev/terms — Terms of Service
